name: io.github.ghostlygawd/engineering-board
description: The board is the database: a git-committed kanban board your AI agents run and remember. Eleven tools over stdio to scaffold boards, create/list/update entries, rebuild the index, capture findings, and claim/release entry locks against a committed markdown tree.

environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the repository whose engineering-board/ tree the server operates on. Defaults to the current working directory when unset.
